chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2290 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Yasir Ali, Accountant on behalf of District Accounts Officer, Khairpur present submits that compliance in terms of order dated 18-09- 2025 has been made. On such statement, learned counsel for the Petitioner, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
